import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_process_batch_includes_all_items():
    """Test that process_batch processes all items including the last one."""
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    result = source.process_batch(items)

    # Fixed code should double each item and return same length as input
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} items, got {len(result)}"
    assert result == [2, 4, 6, 8, 10], f"Expected [2, 4, 6, 8, 10], got {result}"
